## SAF1.3. Rate of runway incursions (RIs) (PI#1)

Hungary reported 2 runway incursions (RI) at Budapest airport during 2025. When comparing the RIs at airport level to Union-wide level, Hungary was below the Union-wide average (1.45 vs 2.53).

Hungary reported 2 RIs with ATS/CNS contribution in 2025. When comparing airport level with ATS/CNS contribution to the Union-wide level, Hungary was above the Union-wide average (1.45 vs 0.96).

The rate of runway incursions at both levels has increased compared to 2024, when Hungary reported 0 RIs.

The monitoring report does not list any initiatives implemented or planned to improve either the RI or SMI performance indicators. However, according to the report, the NSA intends to monitor through occurrence reporting, EoSM.
